title: OWASP Multi-Stage Web Attack Chain (Combined Methods)
description: Correlates web attack indicators across WAF, Load Balancer, and application logs to identify multi-stage attack chains. An IP that triggers WAF blocks, generates auth failures, and accesses sensitive endpoints is likely executing a coordinated attack campaign. Uses combined methods (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Combined Methods - multi-stage grouping).
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs') | stats count as total_events, distinctcount('Log Source') as log_sources, unique('Action') as actions, unique('Response Code') as status_codes by 'Client IP' | where log_sources > 1 | sort -total_events
